description: Achra-branded presentation builder. Users create slides from fixed Achra templates and fill in text content. Templates control all visual decisions (colors, icons, layout).
name: AchraPresentation

modules.description: Presentation metadata and generic slide management (add, delete, reorder, duplicate)
modules.name: core

operations.description: Set presentation-level metadata (title, author, date)
operations.name: SET_PRESENTATION_INFO
operations.template: Set presentation-level metadata (title, author, date)

operations.description: Add a new slide with a chosen template at a given position
operations.name: ADD_SLIDE
operations.reducer:
const newSlide = {
  id: action.input.id,
  template: action.input.template,
  title: null,
  subtitle: null,
  supertitle: null,
  description: null,
  footerLeft: null,
  footerRight: null,
  slogan: null,
  quoteText: null,
  speakerName: null,
  speakerRole: null,
  bigNumber: null,
  codeContent: null,
  imageUrl: null,
  leftTitle: null,
  leftText: null,
  rightTitle: null,
  rightText: null,
  links: [],
  bulletItems: [],
  steps: [],
  processSteps: [],
  agendaItems: [],
  milestones: [],
  columns: [
    { title: null, bulletItems: [] },
    { title: null, bulletItems: [] },
    { title: null, bulletItems: [] }
  ],
  checklistItems: [],
  iconListItems: [],
  highlights: []
};
const pos = action.input.position;
if (pos !== undefined && pos !== null && pos >= 0 && pos < state.slides.length) {
  state.slides.splice(pos, 0, newSlide);
} else {
  state.slides.push(newSlide);
}
operations.template: Add a new slide with a chosen template at a given position

global.schema:
enum SlideTemplate {
  TITLE
  TITLE_PRIMARY
  SECTION_DIVIDER_CENTERED
  SECTION_DIVIDER_LEFT
  BULLETS_IMAGE
  IMAGE_BULLETS
  STATS_METRICS
  TWO_COLUMN_TEXT
  QUOTE
  PROCESS_TIMELINE
  FEATURE_GRID
  BIG_IMAGE_CAPTION
  BEFORE_AFTER
  CHART_PLACEHOLDER
  AGENDA
  TEAM_GRID
  THREE_COLUMN_BULLETS
  BIG_NUMBER
  IMAGE_GRID
  ROADMAP
  PRICING_TIERS
  TESTIMONIAL
  NUMBERED_STEPS
  CODE_BLOCK
  DATA_TABLE
  CHECKLIST
  TWO_IMAGES
  ICON_LIST
  SPLIT_HIGHLIGHT
  TAGS_ECOSYSTEM
  CONTACT_CARD
  THANK_YOU
  LOGO_ONLY
  ICON_SLOGAN
}

enum TextListField {
  BULLET_ITEMS
  STEPS
}

type TextItem {
  id: OID!
  text: String!
}

type Link {
  id: OID!
  text: String!
}

type ProcessStep {
  id: OID!
  title: String!
  description: String
}

type AgendaItem {
  id: OID!
  title: String!
}

type MilestoneItem {
  id: OID!
  period: String!
  title: String!
  description: String
}

type BulletColumn {
  title: String
  bulletItems: [TextItem!]!
}

type ChecklistItem {
  id: OID!
  text: String!
  checked: Boolean!
}

type IconListItem {
  id: OID!
  title: String!
  description: String
}

type HighlightItem {
  id: OID!
  value: String!
  label: String!
  sublabel: String
}

type Slide {
  id: OID!
  template: SlideTemplate!
  title: String
  subtitle: String
  supertitle: String
  description: String
  footerLeft: String
  footerRight: String
  slogan: String
  quoteText: String
  speakerName: String
  speakerRole: String
  bigNumber: String
  codeContent: String
  imageUrl: String
  leftTitle: String
  leftText: String
  rightTitle: String
  rightText: String
  links: [Link!]!
  bulletItems: [TextItem!]!
  steps: [TextItem!]!
  processSteps: [ProcessStep!]!
  agendaItems: [AgendaItem!]!
  milestones: [MilestoneItem!]!
  columns: [BulletColumn!]!
  checklistItems: [ChecklistItem!]!
  iconListItems: [IconListItem!]!
  highlights: [HighlightItem!]!
}

type AchraPresentationState {
  title: String
  author: String
  date: String
  slides: [Slide!]!
}
